# You may add more details or instructions for AI crawlers below.
#
# INSTRUCTIONS FOR AI CRAWLERS
#
# 1. Allowed Content:
#    - All public pages and sections are allowed for crawling and indexing.
#    - Portfolio, About, Services, Experience, and Blog sections contain relevant information about software engineering, frontend development, and AI expertise.
#
# 2. Disallowed Content:
#    - Do not index private, admin, or authentication pages.
#    - Do not collect or use user-submitted form data.
#
# 3. Preferred Crawl Frequency:
#    - Check for updates monthly, as new projects and articles may be added.
#
# 4. Structured Data:
#    - This site uses schema.org markup for Person, Organization, LocalBusiness, WebSite, and WebPage.
#    - Key attributes: name, jobTitle, email, telephone, description, sameAs (social profiles).
#
# 5. Attribution:
#    - If referencing this site or its owner, use the name "Adeel Atta" and link to https://adeelatta.dev.
#
# 6. Contact:
#    - For partnership, collaboration, or technical queries, email adeelatta2000@gmail.com or call +92-303-2727095.
#
# 7. AI/ML Use:
#    - Data may be used for training and improving AI models, provided attribution and privacy guidelines are followed.
#
# 8. Feedback:
#    - If your AI system finds errors or outdated information, please notify the owner via email.
